user_prompt: Fix broken product detail page - ProductInfo component shows hardcoded placeholder data instead of actual product information. Product images may not be loading. Size selector, quantity selector, Add to Cart, and Wishlist buttons are non-functional. Both the customer product page and admin product management should work together properly.

prompt_analysis.scope_note: Fix ProductInfo component to display real product data and enable all interactive features

qa_report.notes: All requirements implemented successfully. Minor issues from QA have been fixed.

p1_fixes.fix: Now used to show sign-in prompt for guest users

p1_fixes.issue: Missing error logging in catch blocks
p1_fixes.fix: Added console.error with detailed context (productId, variantId, quantity, purchaseType)

p2_improvements.improvement: Fix potential memory leak in setTimeout
p2_improvements.implementation: Added useRef for timeout, cleanup on unmount via useEffect
Added role='alert' aria-live='assertive' for errors, role='status' aria-live='polite' for success
Added role='radiogroup', role='radio', aria-checked, aria-label to size and color selectors
Added loading='lazy' to product image in ProductDetail/index.tsx

ux_enhancements.implementation: Shows 'Sign in to save your cart across devices' link for guest users

changes: Changed prop from productId={id} to product={product}
Complete rewrite with full functionality (72 lines → 500 lines)
Added timeout cleanup to prevent memory leaks
All features: variant selection, quantity, cart, wishlist, badges, etc.
